rule.desc: Classes/modules directly depend on concrete implementations.
rule.why_bad: Changes ripple through system, hard to test, inflexible.

rule.desc: Module A imports B, B imports A.
rule.better: Break dependency cycles with clear interfaces and layering.

rule.why_bad: Hard to understand, test, maintain. Violates SRP.

rule.desc: Method uses another class's data more than its own.
rule.better: Move method to the class it envies.

rule.desc: Classes know too much about each other's internals.
Class just delegates to another class.
rule.better: Remove middle man or give it real responsibility.

rule.desc: Same group of parameters passed together everywhere.
rule.better: Introduce a parameter object or value object.

rule.desc: Using primitives instead of small objects.
rule.better: Introduce value objects or enums instead of primitives.

rule.desc: Single change requires modifying many classes.
